headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks on Our Watchlist and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: While strong cash flow is a key indicator of stability, it doesn’t always translate to superior returns. Some cash-heavy businesses struggle with inefficient spending, slowing demand, or weak competitive positioning.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on EQT, Raises Price Target to $70
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Stephen Richardson   maintains EQT (NYSE:EQT) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $60 to $70.
